title: Alicha Chicken with Kik Spices
description: A flavorful and aromatic Ethiopian dish made with marinated chicken, served with a side of sautéed kik spices and a sprinkle of cilantro.

ingredients.name: kik spice blend
ingredients.notes: available at most Ethiopian markets or online

instructions: 1. In a large bowl, whisk together kik spice blend, garlic, and olive oil to make a marinade.
2. Add the chicken breasts to the marinade and mix well to coat. Cover and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
4. Remove the chicken from the marinade and place on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
5. Bake the chicken for 25-30 minutes or until cooked through.
6. While the chicken is baking, heat a large skillet over medium-high heat.
7. Add the chopped onion and cook for 3-4 minutes or until softened.
8. Add the sliced ginger and cook for an additional minute.
9. Once the chicken is cooked, let it rest for 5 minutes before slicing.
10. Serve the sliced chicken with the sautéed onion and ginger mixture spooned over the top.
11. Garnish with chopped cilantro and serve immediately.
